---- MODULE PrimaryBackup ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Primary, Backups

VARIABLES state, pending, opSeq, backupSeqs, opAcked, opAckedBy

(* State is a sequence of operations *)
(* pending is a sequence of operations that have been sent to backups but not yet acknowledged *)
(* opSeq is the sequence number of the last operation that has been acknowledged by the primary *)
(* backupSeqs is a function from backup identifiers to sequences of operations that have been replicated to that backup *)
(* opAcked is a function from operation identifiers to booleans indicating whether the operation has been acknowledged by the primary *)
(* opAckedBy is a function from operation identifiers to sets of backup identifiers indicating which backups have acknowledged the oper

spec_preview:
---- MODULE PrimaryBackup ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
ASSUME N >= 1

VARIABLES primary, backups, state, lastAcked

vars == <<primary, backups, state, lastAcked>>

Init ==
    /\ primary = 0
    /\ backups = <<>>  \* Sequence of backup IDs
    /\ state = <<>>     \* Sequence of operations
    /\ lastAcked = 0

Next ==
    \/ \E op \in Nat :
        /\ primary = 0
        /\ state' = Append(state, op)
        /\ backups' = backups
        /\ lastAcked' = lastAcked
    \/ \E b \in Nat : \E op \in Nat :
        /\ primary > 0
        /\ b \in backups
        /\ state' = Append(state, op)
        /\ backups' = backups
        /\ lastAcked' = lastAcked
    \/ \E b \in Nat :
        /\ primary > 0
        /\ b \in backups
        /\ state' = state
        /\ backups'

spec_preview:
---- MODULE ATM ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES state, card, pin, amount, dispensed

(* State machine states *)
Idle == state = "Idle"
CardInserted == state = "CardInserted"
PINEntered == state = "PINEntered"
Dispensing == state = "Dispensing"
Done == state = "Done"

(* ATM actions *)
InsertCard(cardNumber) == 
    /\ Idle
    /\ state' = "CardInserted"
    /\ card' = cardNumber
    /\ pin' = ""
    /\ amount' = 0
    /\ dispensed' = 0

EnterPIN(pinNumber) == 
    /\ CardInserted
    /\ state' = "PINEntered"
    /\ pin' = pinNumber
    /\ amount' = 0
    /\ dispensed' = 0

EnterAmount(amountNumber) == 
    /\ PINEntered
    /\ state' = "Dispensing"
    /\ amount' = amountNumber
    /\ dispensed' = 0

DispenseCash == 
    /\ Dispensing
    /\ state' = "Done"
    /\ d

spec_preview:
---- MODULE SimpleAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, Clients

Pages == 1..N

VARIABLE free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

RequestPage(c) == /\ free /= {}
                  /\ c \in Clients
                     /\ ~(c \in DOMAIN allocated)
                  /\ free' = free \ {CHOOSE p \in free : TRUE}
                     /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {CHOOSE p \in free : TRUE}]
                  /\ UNCHANGED <<free>>

ReleasePage(c, p) == /\ c \in DOMAIN allocated
                     /\ p \in allocated[c]
                  /\ free' = free \cup {p}
                     /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]
                  /\ UNCHANGED <<free>>

Next == \E c \in Clients :

spec_preview:
---- MODULE TicketDispenser ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES ticket, counter



TypeOK == /\ ticket \in Nat
          /\ counter \in Nat

Init == /\ ticket = 0
        /\ counter = 0

TicketStep == /\ ticket' = ticket + 1
             /\ counter' = counter

CounterStep == /\ ticket' = ticket
             /\ counter' = counter + 1

Next == TicketStep \/ CounterStep

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<ticket, counter>>

====
